task_title: Evaluation — pre-commit gate definitions before any backtest runs

marcus.summary: Regime gate: abs(regime_sharpe[i]) / sum(abs(regime_sharpe)) contribution metric, 70% threshold, flag (half-weight) not kill. Three windows: pre-COVID 2018-01-01 to 2020-01-31, COVID crash+recovery 2020-02-01 to 2021-06-30, post-recovery 2021-07-01 to 2024-12-31. Correlation gate: daily log-returns of equity curve, Pearson r. Full-period r < 0.7; stress-period r < 0.6 (COVID crash 2020-02-01 to 2020-06-30 AND rate-hike bear 2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31). Tiebreaker: higher DSR-Sharpe wins; within 5%, prefer different edge bucket.

build.notes: Documentation-only task. No code written. Three new decision files written; two existing decisions confirmed as covering remaining criteria. Task moved to archive.

Full-period Pearson r < 0.7 AND stress-period r < 0.6; stress windows: COVID crash 2020-02-01 to 2020-06-30, rate-hike bear 2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31; tiebreaker: higher DSR-Sharpe, then different edge bucket
